Package org.mitre.synthea.helpers.physiology

Class PhysiologyGeneratorConfig

java.lang.Object
org.mitre.synthea.helpers.physiology.PhysiologyGeneratorConfig
public class PhysiologyGeneratorConfig extends Object
ValueGenerator configuration for a physiology model file.
